name: create_transcription
description: Transcribe audio files to text using OpenAI's Whisper model. Supports mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, and webm formats up to 25 MB. Can auto-detect the language or transcribe in a specified language. Returns the transcribed text in various output formats.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The audio file to transcribe (multipart form upload). Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm. Max 25 MB.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language of the audio in ISO-639-1 format (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'es'). Improves accuracy when specified.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Optional text to guide the transcription style or provide context for ambiguous audio.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 1. Lower values give more deterministic results (default 0).

body.text: Good morning everyone. Today we'll be discussing the quarterly results and our plans for the next quarter. Let me start by sharing some highlights from the past three months.

segments.text: Today we'll be discussing the quarterly results and our plans for the next quarter.
